titles.en: Wealth transforms exile into homeland while poverty estranges homeland
Wealth transforms exile into homeland while poverty estranges homeland

segments: ٥٦. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): الْغِنَى فِي الْغُرْبَةِ وَطَنٌ، وَالْفَقْرُ فِي الْوَطَنِ غُرْبَةٌ.
arabic.text: ٥٦. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): الْغِنَى فِي الْغُرْبَةِ وَطَنٌ، وَالْفَقْرُ فِي الْوَطَنِ غُرْبَةٌ.

segments: 56. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: With wealth a strange land is a homeland, while with destitution even a homeland is a strange land. [1]
en.sayed-ali-raza.text: 56. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: With wealth a strange land is a homeland, while with destitution even a homeland is a strange land. [1]
